mapper.select: select bnum,userid,title,content,count, to_char(updatedate,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') updatedate_String, to_char(boarddate,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') boarddate_String from board where bnum = #{bnum}
mapper.update: update board set count = count+1 where bnum = #{bnum}
update board set title = #{title} , content = #{content} , updatedate = sysdate where bnum = #{bnum}
